content: React Hook Form v7 + Zod v3 via @hookform/resolvers is the 2025 standard for TypeScript form validation. Key pattern: define Zod schema, use z.infer for TypeScript type, pass zodResolver to useForm. Benefits: uncontrolled components (zero re-renders), compile-time type safety, runtime validation, error messages from schema, cross-field validation. Best practice: define schemas in separate /lib/validations/ file, reuse across form and server action (Zod works server-side too for input validation).
